prompt:
[female character] Image 1, Image 2, Image 3

[Pose and Expression]

A woman is affectionately back-hugging a man, wrapping her arms around his neck from behind. Both have their eyes closed and are smiling brightly, showing teeth, capturing an intimate and joyful moment of a couple. The woman is positioned at the top of the frame, and the man at the bottom. The faces of the woman and the man occupy the top and bottom of the frame in a 50/50 ratio. Their faces are never placed at the same height.

[Clothing]

The man is wearing a neat black suit jacket over a tidy white dress shirt. The woman is wearing a simple and elegant white off-the-shoulder dress that cleanly reveals her shoulders and collarbone, giving off a sophisticated vibe.

[Hairstyle and Makeup Details]

The man has a neat black hair style with a part, while the woman has a high bun with bangs and flyaways naturally falling in front of her face. The woman is wearing gold hoop earrings with pearl drops and has clean, transparent makeup.

[Lighting and Direction]

Bright and even white studio lighting is softly diffused from behind the subjects. It creates strong shadows on the faces, giving it a realistic wedding snapshot feel.

[Texture and Color Mood]

The color palette is warm and bright, centered around white and soft beige tones. The soft skin texture of the subjects and the natural skin wrinkles that appear when they smile are vividly expressed, creating a romantic and neat mood.

[Film and Camera Lens Depth, Angle]

A front-facing eye-level close-up shot that fills the screen with the smiling faces of the two people. A shallow depth of field is used to completely out-focus the background, focusing attention only on the vivid expressions and emotions of the subjects.

[Background Elements (Optional)]

A clean, minimalist, solid-color light gray studio background with no decorations. In the center of the screen, the text "Love me more" and "forever" are written in white. In the bottom right, the Threads logo operated by Meta is small, and above it, "CHAse" is written small like a signature in white cursive. 9:16 ratio
